We're not just another URL shortener. Our platform is built with a focus on reliability, user experience, and detailed analytics. Join thousands of users who trust us to simplify and amplify their digital presence.

OUR PLATFORM

One tool.
Everything links need.

Replace a stack of disconnected tools with one unified platform built for scale.

URL Shortening

Any URL → a clean short link instantly. Bulk import supported.

InstantBulk

Real-time clicks, geo, device, browser & UTM — auto-tracked on every link.

LiveUTMGeo

Smart Routing

Route visitors by location, device, A/B split, or schedule. No code.

GeoA/B

Custom Domains

Get Started· freeSee pricing
Live analytics · updated now

Analytics

Know exactly where every click comes from.

Snipr captures rich click data the moment someone hits your link — country, city, device, browser, referrer, and campaign parameters — all visible in one clean dashboard.

  • Geographic breakdown down to city level
  • Device, OS, and browser analytics
  • Referrer and UTM campaign tracking
  • Click trends over days, weeks, and months
Link Analytics · snipr.sh/launchActive
4,821
Total Clicks
3,104
Unique
5.2%
CTR
MonTueWedThuFriSatSun
Top countries
🇺🇸United States
62%
🇬🇧United Kingdom
14%
🇩🇪Germany
9%
🇫🇷France
7%
🇨🇦Canada
5%
Routing Rules · snipr.sh/campaign4 rules active
Country = US
→ snipr.sh/us-page
Device = Mobile
→ snipr.sh/mobile
A/B split 70/30
→ variant-a / variant-b
Default fallback
→ snipr.sh/main
Rules evaluate top → bottom · Last rule is default fallback

Smart Routing

One link, infinite destinations.

Stop sending every visitor to the same page. Snipr's routing engine evaluates rules in real time and sends each person to the most relevant destination based on who they are.

  • Geo targeting — country and region rules
  • Device routing — mobile, desktop, tablet
  • A/B split testing with custom traffic weights
  • Rotator mode — cycle through destinations evenly

AI Insights

Ask questions.
Get real answers.

Snipr reads your real analytics and surfaces weekly summaries, detects patterns you'd miss, and answers specific questions about your data in plain English.

  • Weekly performance summaries — no setup needed
  • Anomaly detection on unusual click spikes or drops
  • Ask what your best link was this month
  • Slug suggestions based on your destination URL
AI Insights AssistantLive
Weekly Summary — Week 12

Your links received 12,481 clicks this week (+23% vs last week). Top performer: snipr.sh/launch-q2 with 4,821 clicks. US traffic grew 31%. Mobile visitors converted at 2× the desktop rate.

Which link had the best CTR last month?

snipr.sh/product-hunt had the highest CTR at 8.4% — well above your 3.1% average. It was shared in a Reddit post that drove 1,200 clicks in 24 hours.

Ask about your link data...

How it works

Up and running in minutes.

01

Create

Paste your URL, set a custom slug, add tags, and configure expiry or click limits.

02

Share

Deploy your branded link across ads, email, social, SMS, or as a QR code.

03

Track

Watch real-time click data, geographic breakdowns, and device splits in your dashboard.

04

Optimise

Review weekly summaries, adjust routing rules, and A/B test based on real data.

Use Cases

Built for teams that do more
than share links

Whether you run campaigns, publish content, or manage growth across products — Snipr gives every team clearer data, better control, and smarter workflows.

Growth Marketers

Run smarter campaigns with measurable outcomes

Track which channels drive performance, split traffic intelligently, and optimize every campaign with real analytics.

UTM-ready branded links
Channel attribution
A/B traffic routing
Conversion tracking
Content Creators

Turn link clicks into audience insight

Share cleaner links, understand what content performs, and see how your audience engages across channels.

  • Branded link profiles
  • Click + geography data
  • QR support for offline content
  • Weekly AI summaries
SaaS & Startup Teams

Manage links across products, teams, and campaigns

Organize shared link workflows with domains, permissions, tags, and reporting built for scale.

  • Team roles and permissions
  • Tags and folders
  • API access
  • Custom domains

Integrations

Works with
your stack.

Connect Snipr to the tools you already use. Automate workflows and surface link data where your team works.

REST API & webhooks included
Slack
Get click alerts and weekly reports in your channels.
Zapier
Connect Snipr to 5,000+ apps without writing code.
Google Analytics
Pass UTM parameters to GA4 on every tracked click.
HubSpot
Sync link click data with your CRM contacts.
Notion
Embed live link analytics inside your workspace.
Webhooks
Fire custom events to any endpoint on each click.

Trusted by modern
teams worldwide

"Snipr helped us turn simple short links into something measurable, scalable, and far more useful for growth."

Sarah M., Growth Lead
